task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Audi A4 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $40300.00 and wholesale is $32240.00. Product features: Compact luxury sedan with quattro all-wheel drive and virtual cockpit. Reference: https://www.audiusa.com/us/web/en/models/a4/a4/2023/overview.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Audi A4. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Audi A4. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
